patterns.description: Pydantic v2 pydantic_encoder() does not handle datetime, UUID, etc. by default. Must add custom handling.
patterns.context: When migrating from Pydantic v1 to v2, custom JSON serialization using pydantic_encoder needs extension.

patterns.description: In Pydantic v2, model_config['extra'] is baked into core schema at class creation. Modifying it post-creation requires model_rebuild(force=True) on all subclasses in reversed order (leaf first).
patterns.context: ExtraArgBaseModel.set_extra() pattern needed rewrite for Pydantic v2.

patterns.description: Pydantic v2 BaseModel.__eq__ no longer compares equal to dicts. Tests that compare model == dict must use model.model_dump() == dict.
In Pydantic v2, model_validator('before') receives raw dict. Fields may not be present. Use values.get() not values[].
OSMO repo pylintrc enforces max-line-length=100 and check-quote-consistency=yes. All new code must respect both.
Bazel caches test results aggressively. Use --cache_test_results=no to force re-run if needed.
patterns.context: When debugging flaky tests or verifying fixes.

patterns.description: __fields_set__ (v1) must be replaced with model_fields_set (v2). Easy to miss because it's a dunder attribute, not a decorated method.
patterns.context: Pydantic v1 to v2 migration — attribute-level changes are harder to find than decorator changes.

patterns.description: OSMO repo uses qualified 'import pydantic' style consistently across all 216+ files. Never 'from pydantic import BaseModel'.
patterns.context: Code style convention — maintain when adding new pydantic code.
